classData.comment:
/**
 * A specialized sub-agent for generating and validating automated test coverage.
 * Configured by default to execute locally ensuring zero-cost test suite scaling.
 *
 * @class Neo.ai.agent.profile.QA
 * @extends Neo.ai.Agent
 */
classData.description: A specialized sub-agent for generating and validating automated test coverage. Configured by default to execute locally ensuring zero-cost test suite scaling.
classData.name: QA

classData.comment:
/**
         * The QA Bot executes natively on the local swarm to prevent token explosion.
         * Default Provider is Ollama, targeting the workspace's default local inference daemon.
         * @member {String|Neo.ai.provider.Base} modelProvider='ollama'
         */
classData.description: The QA Bot executes natively on the local swarm to prevent token explosion. Default Provider is Ollama, targeting the workspace's default local inference daemon.
classData.name: modelProvider

classData.comment:
/**
         * The QA agent needs context matching capabilities to assert components,
         * so we attach the knowledge base and the file system server.
         * @member {String[]} servers=['knowledge-base','file-system']
         */
classData.description: The QA agent needs context matching capabilities to assert components, so we attach the knowledge base and the file system server.
classData.name: servers
